_publications._publicationTitle: Feasibility of magnetic resonance-guided high-intensity focused ultrasound treatment targeting distinct nodular lesions in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: median percent PTV was 88.3% (51.8–98.8%). Of the 33 lesions that met criteria for partial ablation, the median percent PTV was 88.3% with a range of 51.8%–98.8% suggesting that despite inability to perform complete ablation
resourceName: Profound Sonalleve V2 (Profound Medical Inc., Mississauga, Ontario, Canada)
details: For partial ablation cases, median percent planned treatment volume was 88.3% (range 51.8-98.8%), suggesting near-complete ablation was achievable despite inability to perform complete ablation
